titleStmt.title: BNFabb39
Sawāsǝw, Treatise on lexicon and grammar

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

supportDesc.foliation: Several sequences of numbers in the upper margin, of which only one goes consistently through all folia (disregarding only the first one, the paper leaf that was added when the volume received the European binding, and the last parchment leaf that has been assigned the number 206).

collation.note: The quire structure cannot be ascertained on the basis of the available images.

history.origin: 18th century, but not after 1796. Unit 1 was produced in the beginning of around the middle of the 18th century, in any case before the 1796, the time of Takla Giyorgis I (reigned in several periods between 1779 and 1800). Unit 2 was produced around the same time (it cannot be excluded that the scribe was the same). Ḥabtu was an owner (possible also the scribe).
history.provenance: The manuscript was bought by Antoine d'Abbadie sometime between 1840 and 1848.
history.acquisition: The manuscript entered Bibliothèque nationale de France in 1902.

bibl.title: Notice sur les manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection d’Abbadie
Extrait du Journal Asiatique
Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection Antoine d’Abbadie
Catalogue raisonné de manuscrits éthiopiens appartenant à Antoine d’Abbadie
Ethiopian Biblical Interpretation: A Study in Exegetical Tradition and Hermeneutics
University of Cambridge Oriental Publications

msItem.title: Introduction. Main theological terms and their translations into Amharic
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ዘወለዶ፡ ለወልድ፡ ወአስረፆ፡ ለመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፨ ወበስመ፡ ወልድ፡ ዘተወልደ፡ እምአብ፨ ወበስመ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ዘሰረፀ፡ እምአብ፨ እጽሕፍ፡ መጸሐፈ፡ ሰዋስው፡ ዘትሰመይ፡ መጽሔተ፡ ልቡና፡ ለዘአንበቦ፨፨፨፨፨፨፨ ስም፡ ብ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፤ አብ፡ ብ፡ አባት፤ ወልድ፡ ብ፡ ልጅ፤ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ብ፡ ሰራፂ፡ ሕይወትም፡ ይባላል፤ ሰረፀ፡ ብ፡ ወጻ፡ አብን፡ መስሎ፡ አኽሎ፤ አቡሁ፡ ዘ፡ አባቱ፤ አቡየ፡ ዘ፡ አባቴ፤ ወልዱ፡ ዘ፡ ልጁ፤ ወልድየ፡ ዘ፡ ልጄ፤ ወለደኒ፡ ዘ፡ ወለደኝ፡ አውጻኝም፡ ይባላል፨ ሕላዌ፡ ዘ፡ አካል፡ ባሕርይም፡ ይባላል፡ ወቦ፡ ዘ፡ ቦታ፤ አካል፡ ዘ፡ ቁመት፤ ገጽ፡ ዘ፡ ፊት፤ መልክዕ፡ ዘ፡ ዓይን፡ አፍ፡ ወአንፍ፡ ዦሮ፡ እጅ፡ አግር፡ የሖሩ፡ ብልት፡ ኹሉ።

msItem.title: Interpretation of the Apostles' names
msItem.incipit: ፍካሬ፡ አስማቲሆሙ፡ ለሐዋርያት፡ አርድዕተ፡ ክርስቶስ። ሐዋርያ፡ ዘ፡ ህያጅ፡ ቃላጴም፡ ደጃማቷም፡ ይባላል፤ ስምዖን፡ ብ፡ ስምዐኒ፡ እግዚአብሔር፤

msItem.title: A lexicon, with many sub-sections
msItem.note: The lexicon shows little systematization. In the beginning it seems to group examples for the use of Ethiopic particles or adverbs, and their Amharic translations (e.g. እስመ, በእንተ, ህየንተ, በይነ, አምጣነ on ; እመ, ሶበ on ; እንዘ on ; እንተ, ዘ, እለ, ለ, ዘ, ከመ on ). The exposition of the particles is sometimes followed by a thematic lexicon, like በዘ፡ ጾታ፡ ፍና, ዲበ, ምዕረ፡ ግብተ፡ on followed by words on topic "time" (ሰዓት፡ ሳዕ፡ ዘ፡ ጊዜ፡, ) and other words (mostly verbs with derived forms). However, the principle is not applied rigorously, further it is difficult to detect any system.

msItem.title: A lexicon "from all books"
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ እምኵሉ፡ መጻሕፍት፤ አርማስ፡ ጌልያ፡ ዘ፡ ምርከብ፤ አውያን፡ ዘ፡ ነቢያት፡ ሮማን፡ ዘ፡ ሐዋርያት፤

msItem.title: On parfumes and plants
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ሽቱ፡ ወነገረ፡ ዕፀዋት። ስኂን፡ ዘ፡ ስንድሮስ፡ ዕጣን፡ ዘ፡ውእቱ፡

msItem.title: On water and streams
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ማያት፤ ማይ፡ ዘወኻ፤ ፈለግ፡ ውኂዝ፡ ዘ፡ ፈሳሽ፤

msItem.title: On rivers, seas, etc.
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ማያት፤ ማይ፡ ዘወኻ፤ ፈለግ፡ ውኂዝ፡ ዘ፡ ፈሳሽ፤

msItem.title: On vases
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ አቅሐ። ማይ፡ ዘወኻ፤ ፈለግ፡ ውኂዝ፡ ዘ፡ ፈሳሽ፤

msItem.title: On weights
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ መስፈርት። ከፈር፡ ወአስፈሪድ፡ ዘ፡ እንቅብ፤

msItem.title: Supplementary, with various words
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ተውሳክ። አስባብ፡ ዘ፡ ዶሰኛ፡ ዘ፡ እንቅብ፤

msItem.title: On names of the Sun and some stars
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ አስማተ፡ ፀሐይ፨ ኦርያሬስ፤ ቶማስ፤ ኢና፨

msItem.title: On the state and institutions
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ መንግሥት፤ ብነት፡ ዘ፡ የበረከት፤ አስራት፡ ዘ፡ ቀረጽ፡ ከአስር፡ ሐንድም፡ ይባላል፤

msItem.title: Explanation of several biblical Hebrew names
Explanation of some biblical female names
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ፍካሬ፡ አስማተ፡ አንስት፤ ሔዋን፡ ብ፡ ሕይወት፤ ሶራ፡ ብ፡ እመ፡ አሐዱ፤ ሳራ፡ ብ፡ እመ፡ ብዙኃን፤

msItem.title: Explanation of the names of the martyrs
Explanation of the names of the righteous
Explanation of the names of the angels
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ዘአበው፤ ካም፡ ብ፡ ዘኢየርፍ፤ ሎጥ፡ ብ፡ ዘተበልሐተ፤

msItem.title: Explanation of the names of the several patriarchs
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ዘአበው፤ ካም፡ ብ፡ ዘኢየርፍ፤ ሎጥ፡ ብ፡ ዘተበልሐተ፤

msItem.title: Explanation of the names of God
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ስመ፡ አምላክ፨
msItem.note: Seems to be differenf from BNFet149_ms_i1.61.

msItem.title: Explanation of the names of God
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ስመ፡ አምላክ፨
msItem.note: Seems to be differenf from BNFet149_ms_i1.61.

msItem.title: Explanation of the Ethiopic letters
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ፍካሬ፡ ፊደል፨ ሀ፡ ብ፡ ሀልዎቱ፡ ለአብ፤ እምቅድመ፡ ዓለም፤

msItem.title: Figures of speech and enigma from the Bible
msItem.incipit: ነገረ፡ ጥበብ፡ ዘኦሪት፡ ወዘነቢያት፨ ፩፤ ዘኢተወልደ፡ ሞተ፡ ወዘተወልደ፡ ኢሞተ፤
msItem.note: The internal text division is indicated with numbers (from 1 to 18) in the margins. Cp. BNFet149_ms_i1.12.

msItem.title: Figures of speech from the New Testament
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ አምሳል፡ ዘሐዲስ፡ ሕግ፡

msItem.title: History of the kings of Rome
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ታሪከ፡ ነገሥት፡ ዘሮም። ያፌት፡ ለወለዶሙ፡ ለዮባል፡ ወባዋን፡ ባዋን ወለዶ፡ ለከይተም፤

msItem.title: An excerpt from Josippon
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ዜና፡ መንግሥተ፡ መታትያ፡ ወልደ፡ ዮሐናዓ፡
msItem.explicit: ወነግሠ፡ አግሪጳስ፡ ወልዱ፡ ግሚዊ፡ ውእቱ፡ ዘቆመ፡ ሎስ፡ ቅድሜሁ፡ ወበመዋዕሊሁ፡ ተሰስተት፡ መቅደስ። ተፈጸመ፡ ታሪከ፡ ነገሥት፡
msItem.note: According to Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection Antoine d’AbbadieMariusChaîneParisImprimerie nationale–Ernest Leroux, éditeur1912https://archive.org/details/cataloguedesmanu00bibluoft28 the text is an exceprt from Josippon. Indeed, it appears to correspond to the story of Metitan, son of Judah after the edition Des Josef ben Gorion (Josippon) Geschichte der Juden ዜና፡ አይሁድ። (Zenā ʾAyhud) nach den Handschriften in Berlin, London, Oxford, Paris und StrassburgMurad KamilNew YorkJ. J. Augustin Publisher193863, but both are similar only in the beginning. The continuation seems to be only a summary based on Josipppon ending with ወነበረ፡ በፋርስ፡ እስከ፡ ጸውዖ፡ ሄሮድስ፡ ተመ(ለስ)፡, the last word possibly referring to the text on .

msItem.title: Interpretation and Symbolic Commentary on Genesis and Exodus
Commentary on Genesis
msItem.incipit: ብሂለ፡ ኦሪት፡ ወነኢያት፡ ተጽሕፈ፡ በልሳነ፡ ኵሉ፡ ፍጥረት፡ በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ መሐሪ፡ ወመስተሣህል፨ እዌጥን፡ ጽሒፈ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ዘይሰመይ፡ መምህረ፡ ኦሪት፡ ዘአስተጋባእክዎ፡ አነ፡ ይስሐቅ፡ መነኮስ፡ ተስእልየ፡ እማእምራን፡ መጻሕፍት፨ ርባሑሰ፡ ለዝ፡ ይሜህር፡ ወይተረጉም፡ ቃላተ፡ ኦሪት፡ እንተ፡ የዐጽብ፡ ወይሰዓን፡ ዘይትባዕ፡ ኦሪት፡ ዘልደት፡ ኦሪት፡ ኦሪት፡ ዘ፡ ሕግ፡ ቦ፡ ዘ፡ መጽሔት፡ ዘልደት፡ ዘፍጥረት፡ መቅደመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ፈጠረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ጽልመተ፡ ወበይእቲ፡ ሌሊት፡ ፈጠረ፡ ፯፡ ፍጥረጣተ፡

msItem.title: Commentary on Exodus
msItem.incipit: ኦሪት፡ ዘፀአት፡ በካልእ፡ ዓመት፡ እምዘ፡ ወጽኡ፡ እስራኤል፡ ተጽሕፈ፡ ዝውእቱ፡ ትርጓሜ፡ ኅቡእ፡ በበአዕፃዲሆሙ፡ ቦኡ፡ በበ፡ ደብተራሆሙ፡ ሕቁራነ፡ ዕዙል፡ ዘ፡ ጽኑአነ፤ ወቦ፡ እ፡ ይ፡ ብዙኃነ፡ ወምኑናነ። ወነደቁ፡ እስራኤል፡ ለፈርዖን፡ አህጉራተ፡ ጽኑዓተ፡ እሉ፡ እሙንቱ፡ ፊቶም፡
msItem.note: Small excerpts from the Exodus are supplied with explanations separated through ዘ, in Gǝʿǝz, in some cases in Amharic (); the units are separated mostly by ፤ sign.

msItem.title: Explanations of Hebrew weight measurements
msItem.incipit: ነገረ፡ መዳልው፡ በልሳነ፡ ዕብራውያን፤ መክሊት፡ ፲ወ፪፲፡ ወቄት፤ አስታር፡ ዘ፡ ፲ወ፪፡ ወቄት፡
msItem.note: Divided from the previous text only by a small blank space left in the line, looks like a continuation of the preceeding text.

msItem.title: Interpretation and Symbolic Commentary on Genesis and Exodus
Commentary on Leviticus
msItem.incipit:
ተጽሕፈ፡ ኦሪት፡ ዘሌዋውያን፡ በ፴ወ፩፡ አመት፡ እምዘወጽአ፡ እስራኤል፡ ዘወጽኡ፡ እስራኤል፡ ዝውእቱ፡ ትርጓሜሁ፡ ክዱን፨ ፨ ወጸውኦ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለሙሴ፡ ወተናገሮ፡ እምውስተ፡ ደብተራ፡ ዘመርጡል፡ ወይቤሎ፡ በሎሙ፡ ለደቂቀ፡ እስራኤል፡ እምቦ፡ ዘአብአ፡ ብእሲ፡ መባዓ፡ እምኔክሙ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡
ማዕነት፡ ዘ፡ ዋህኖስ፡ ቦ፡ ዘ፡ ቡላል፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ርግብ፡ ጸሊም፤ ርግብ፡ ዘ፡ በቁሙ፤ ምስዋዕ፡ ዘ፡ አምሳለ፡ ምዳጃ፤

msItem.title: Commentary for Numbers
msItem.incipit: ኦሪት፡ ዘኍልቍ፡ ተጽሕፈ፡ እምዘ፡ ወጽኡ፡ እስራኤል፡ በሰላሣ፡ ወበሳምንቱ፡ ዓመት፡ በሥምረተ፡ አምላክ፡ ወነበቦ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለሙሴ፡ በገዳም፡ ዘሲና፡ ውስተ፡ ደብተራ፡ ዘመርጡል፡ ወይቤሎ፡ አኀዙ፡ እምጥንቱ፡ ተባእቶሙ፡ ዘእም፩ወርኅ፡ ወላዕሉ፡ እምኔሁ፡ ፪፼፡ ወ፳፻፡ ምስለ፡ ኃይሎሙ፡ ዘ፡ ከሐርናቸው፡ ጋራ፤

msItem.title: Commentaries on the Books of Kings
Commentaries on 4 Kings (2 Kings)
msItem.incipit: መጽሐፈ፡ ነገሥት፡ ራብዕ፡ ተጽሕፈ፡ በልስነ፡ ቅብጢ፡ ወበዓረቢ፡ ወበዕራይስጢ። ሀሎ፡ ብሔር፡ ኀበዝ፡ መካን፡ ወእምድኅረ፡ ሞተ፡ አካአብ፡ አጽረሩ፡ ሞአብ፡ ዘ፡ እምቢ፡ አሉ፡

msItem.title: List of the Kings of Israel
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ኍልቈ፡ ነገሥት፡ ዘነግሡ፡ ለእስራኤል፡ ድኅረ፡ መሳፍንት፡ ቅዳሜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ነገሠ፡ ሳኦል፡ ለእስራኤል፡ ዓመታት፡ ፵።

msItem.title: Another collection of commentary and lexical treatise for various books
Lexicon for Song of Songs
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ማኅልየ፡ ዘሰሎሞን፡ ይስእመኒ፡ ዘ፡ በእንተ፡ ሥጋሁ፡ ወደሙ፡ አዳም፡ ዘ፡ በጎ፡ አጥባትኪ፡ ዘ፡ ወንጌል፤

msItem.title: Lexicon for Proverbs
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ሰሎሞን። ጽንፈት፡ ዘ፡ ወንቀራብ፡ ዘውእቱ፡ አሽከላ፡
msItem.note: አሽከላ፡ for modern አሽክላ፡. The passage from to , lagerly corresponds, with deviations (sometimes very significant), to BNFet149_ms_i1.15, .

msItem.title: Lexicon for Sirach
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ሲራክ፤ አስተአሪ፡ ዘ፡ አታገናኝ፤ ኢትግበር፡ ዘ፡ አተአድርግ፤ ወይዜወሩ፡ ዘ፡ ይመላለሱ፤ ኢይሰሂ፡ ዘ፡ አይለይም፤ ሐው፡ ዘ፡ እሳት፤

msItem.title: Explanation of words in Sirach
msItem.incipit: ነገረ፡ ሲራክ፡ ነቢይ፡ ቅዳሜ፡ መፍቀዱ፡ ለሰብእ፡ ማይ፤ ወእሳት፤ ፄው፡ ሐፂን፤ እክል፡ ወስርናይ፡

msItem.title: Lexicon for Didaskalia
msItem.incipit: ዘዳድስቅልያ፡ ድድስቅልያ፡ ዘ፡ መላእክት፤ ኔጴሎቦኖስ፡ ዘ፡ አንባቢ፤ ዓጌ፡ ዘ፡ ክታን፤

msItem.title: Explanations for the names of the peoples in the genealogical tables of the Old Testament
msItem.incipit: ትርጓሜ፡ ስመ፡ ሀገር፡ በስመ፡ አሕዛበ፤ ኢያራት፡ ዘ፡ ያሬድ፤ ሄኖት፡ ሄኖክ፡ ዘ፩ስም። ጋሜር፡ ቴርጋም፡ ፩ስም፡ ወልደ፡ ያፌት፡ ውእቱ፡ ወበስመ፡ ዚአሁ፡ ተሰመየት፡ ሀገሩ፤

msItem.title: Commentary for 1 Chronicles (Paralipomenon, ኅፁፃን)
msItem.incipit: ትርጓሜ፡ ኅፁፃን። ኅፁፃን፡ ብ፡ ከነገሥት፡ የቀሩ፡ ማጎግ፡ ዘ፡ አቡሆሙ፡ ለሰብእ፡ ዘይዘክሮሙ፡
msItem.note: Different from No item: BNFet149, could not check for ms_i1.5.

msItem.title: Commentary for 2 Chronicles (2 Paralipomenon, ካልእ፡ ኅፁፃን።)
msItem.incipit: ካልእ፡ ኅፁፃን። አስትዓ፡ ዘ፡ አምኃ፤ መፍዱ፡ ብሩር፡ ዘ፡ ጽሩይ፡ ዘኢኮነ፡ ግብዝ፤ ሜላት፡ ዘ፡ ኅብረ፡ ከብድ። ወቦ፡ ዘ፡ ፀዓዳ፤
msItem.note: Different from No item: BNFet149, could not check for ms_i1.5.

msItem.title: Lexicon for Jubilees
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ኩፋሌ። ኢዮቤል፡ ሐሳብ፡ ኍልቍ፡ ፍቅድ፡ ዘ፡ ቈጸራት፤ አውዐየ፡ ዘ፡ ተኰሰ፤ ክፍቱር፡ ዘ፡ ግዙር፤ ከፍተረ፡ ገዘረ፤

msItem.title: Lexicon for Job
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ኢዮብ። እተሐል፡ ዘ፡ እቀላውጥ፡ እቅበዘበዝም፡ ይባላል፤ ጸጥ፡ ዘ፡ ዝምታ፤ ክንፈ፡ ምድር፡ ዘ፡ የምድር፡ ዳር፤

msItem.title: A part of the Commentary on the Book of Isaiah
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ኢሳይያስ። በጸዉ፡ ዘ፡ አንቀላፋ፤ አንጸፋሂ፡ ይትበኃል፤ በጸዋ፡ ዘሴቶች፡ አንቀላፋ፤

msItem.title: Lexicon for Ezekiel
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ሕዝቄል። እለ፡ ቄጥሩ፡ ዖፍ፡ ዘራብዕ፡ ረእሱ፤ አውራስ፡ ማዙራት፡ ዘከዋክብት፤ ቤዜቃ፡ ዘ፡ ዕንቝ፤ ዘይወልዶ፡ ዖፍ፡ ተርሴስ፡ ዘ፡ በጎ፡ ወኸ፤
msItem.note: Encompassing several sub-parts the corresponding passage in BNFet149, begins similarly but is much shorter.

msItem.title: Lexicon for Ezra and Daniel
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ እዝራ፡ ወነገረ፡ ዳኒኤል። ታዔሱ፡ ዘ፡ ተአገሱ፤

msItem.title: Lexicon for Jeremiah
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ኤርምያስ። ሞራዕ፡ ዘ፡ ጕልሻ፤ ትቤኪ፡ ዘ፡ ዘር፤ ድንቀል፡ ዘ፡ ጋጋ፡ ሳንኤል፡ ዘ፡ እንኵርኵር፤

msItem.title: Lexicon for Maccabees
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ መቃብያን። መቃብያን፡ ዘ፡ ዐቃብያን፤ ገድግዱ፡ ዘ፡ በቁሙ፤

msItem.title: Lexicon for the Books of Prophets
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ነቢያት። እትናከራ፡ ዘ፡ እጻለዋት፤ እትናከሮ፡ ዘ፡ እጻላው፤ አንጌግያ፡ ዘ፡ አስሕታ፡ አዘውቃም፡ ይባላል፤

msItem.title: Lexicon for Psalter
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ዳዊት። ንበትክ፡ ዘ፡ ንቈርጻለን፤ እምኔነ፡ ማእሠሪሆሙ፡ ዘ፡ ከኛ፡ ማሰርያቸው፤ ወንግደፍ፡ እምላዕለነ፡ ዘ፡ እንጥል፡ አለን፡ ኸላያችን፤ አርፁቶሙ፡ ዘ፡ ቀበራቸው፤

msItem.title: Lexicon for the Books of the Prophets
msItem.incipit: እጽሕፍ፡ ነገረ፡ ነቢያት፤ በመስልስት፡ ዘ፡ በበ፫፡ ሰብእ፡ በ፩፡ ፈረስ፡ ምንዙኅ፡ ዘ፡ ሕንቅቅ፡

layout.note: The number of characters per line: 10-11 on .
In some of the text parts, a few lines of the heading may be written in one column, as well as a few lines of the explicit.
The number of characters per line: 11-12 on .

handNote.desc: Fine, careful, somewhat irregular; by a mediocre but experienced scribe. Broad, broadly spaced, upright to slightly left sloping script.

desc.title: Names of the months in Ethiopic and various other languages, such as Arabic, Coptic, Greek, Latin, Hebrew etc. (General record)

item.q: ስመ፡ አውራሕ፡ ዘግብጽ፤ ተውት፡ ዘ፡ መስከረም፡ ባባ፡ ዘጥቅምት፤ ሐቱር፡ ዘ፤ ሕዳር፤ ሚካር፡ ዘ፡ የካቲት፤ ሜምንዮስ፡ ዘ፡ መጋቢት፤
item.note: It contains sub-parts for the names of the months in various languages, such as Coptic, "Roman", of "Franks", Arabic, Hebrew, "Romya", Syriac, Greek. Written in the main .
Written in a think pen, carelessly, but possibly still in the main , mentioning Ḥabtu.

item.desc: A note of private or biographical character
item.quote: ሐሙስ፡ ዐርብ፡ ቅዳሜ፡ ፲ በ፶፫ወ፭፻ዓመተ፡ ዓለም፡ በ፲፻ወ፯፻፹ወ፰፡ ዓመተ፡ ምሕረት፡ በዘመነ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ አመ፡ ፲ወ፬ወ፭ለነሐሴ፡ ኮነ፡ ልማድ። ዘዚአየ፡ ዝኒ፡ ተጽሕፈ፡ አመ፡ ተፈነወ፡ ጦመር፡ ውስተ፡ ቤተ፡ ንጉሥ፡ በለየካቲት፡ በዕለተ፡ ሐሙስ፡
item.note: A note is difficult to understand; one date refers to 1788, the year of John which is 1796 CE but the reference to day is unclear. Other dates mentioned are also unclear. An addition below the note made in a very similar or the same hand mentions the year of the mercy 90, and the king Takla Giyorgis I.

item.desc: Unidentified collection of hymns, possibly qǝne-poems
item.note: Written in a thin pen, carelessly, in a hand similar to the main

item.desc: Shelf-mark of the manuscript (Ethiop. Abb. 39) on the inner side of the left board.
Some words in French, partly difficult to read, describing the content of the manuscript; a stamp of the library, two Ethipic letters (ሐ በ).
Corrections of various types on some folia, including omitted passages added by means of tamallas-signs.

msItem.title: Mystery of the Psalms of David
msItem.incipit: ምስጢረ፡ ዳዊት፡ ፻ወ፶፲ወ፭ነቢያት፡ ዘአልቦ፡ ሕሳዌ፡ ለዘአእመረ፡ ፍካሬሁ፡ ፩ብፁዕ፡ በእንተ፡ ብእሲት፡ ጽሒፍካ፡ ይእስሩ፡ ውስተ፡ ሃውቄሃ፡ ፪ለምንት፡ ለብእሲት፡ ሶበ፡ የሐንቆ፡ አጽም፡
msItem.note: The end of the text is half-erased and poorly visible, possibly in a different hand, but written in a smaller letters, to accomodate some 14 written lines.

handNote.seg: Second half of the 18th/beginning or the first half of the 19th century.
handNote.desc: Careful but somewhat irregular; by a mediocre scribe. Written in big letters.

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: created the description on the basis of BNF images
